allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=1234 psql -U postgres -h localhost -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS sports_scoring_db;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=1234 psql -U postgres -h localhost -c "CREATE DATABASE sports_scoring_db;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=1234 psql -U postgres -h localhost -d sports_scoring_db -f "M:/sports scoring app/sports-scoring-app/scripts/setup-full-db.sql" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=1234 psql -U postgres -h localhost -d sports_scoring_db -c "
SELECT 'users' as tbl, count\(*\) FROM users
UNION ALL SELECT 'teams', count\(*\) FROM teams
UNION ALL SELECT 'players', count\(*\) FROM players
UNION ALL SELECT 'matches', count\(*\) FROM matches
UNION ALL SELECT 'sports', count\(*\) FROM sports
UNION ALL SELECT 'tournaments', count\(*\) FROM tournaments
UNION ALL SELECT 'tournament_groups', count\(*\) FROM tournament_groups
UNION ALL SELECT 'group_teams', count\(*\) FROM group_teams
UNION ALL SELECT 'group_matches', count\(*\) FROM group_matches
UNION ALL SELECT 'cricket_config', count\(*\) FROM cricket_match_config
UNION ALL SELECT 'volleyball_config', count\(*\) FROM volleyball_match_config
UNION ALL SELECT 'chess_config', count\(*\) FROM chess_match_config
UNION ALL SELECT 'futsal_config', count\(*\) FROM futsal_match_config
UNION ALL SELECT 'tt_config', count\(*\) FROM table_tennis_match_config
UNION ALL SELECT 'badminton_config', count\(*\) FROM badminton_match_config
UNION ALL SELECT 'user_memberships', count\(*\) FROM user_team_memberships
UNION ALL SELECT 'user_stats', count\(*\) FROM user_sports_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'user_participation', count\(*\) FROM user_match_participation
ORDER BY tbl;
" 2>&1)
